tasks.title: Add portable-pty dependency to Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Add portable-pty dependency to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/Cargo.toml
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify Cargo.toml contains portable-pty with correct version
AddUnitTest: verify dependency resolves without conflicts
tasks.impl_notes: Add portable-pty with features for cross-platform PTY support

tasks.title: Add portable-pty to features in Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Add portable-pty to the features section in opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/Cargo.toml
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify portable-pty feature is defined in features list
tasks.impl_notes: Define feature flag for optional portable-pty support

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::new(command: &[&str])
tasks.description: Create PTY master/slave pair on Unix systems. The constructor takes a command slice and spawns a new process with the PTY as its stdin/stdout/stderr.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify PtySimulator::new creates master/slave pair successfully
AddUnitTest: verify command argument is passed correctly to child process
AddErrorHandlingTest: test error handling when command does not exist
tasks.impl_notes: Use portable-pty::MasterPTY and Command::new for spawn

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::write_input(data: &str)
tasks.description: Write string data to the PTY slave, which will be received by the child process as input.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify data written to write_input appears on child process stdout
AddUnitTest: verify UTF-8 string handling works correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Write to PTY slave using std::io::Write trait

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::read_output()
tasks.description: Read from PTY master with configurable timeout. Returns output collected from child process stdout/stderr.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify read_output returns data written by child process
AddUnitTest: verify timeout returns empty string if no output
AddUnitTest: verify configurable timeout parameter works
tasks.impl_notes: Use std::io::Read with timeout mechanism

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::resize(cols: u16, rows: u16)
tasks.description: Resize the PTY window dimensions to the specified columns and rows, affecting the child's terminal settings.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify resize changes PTY dimensions correctly
AddUnitTest: verify SIGWINCH is sent to child process
tasks.impl_notes: Use portable-pty API to set window size

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::inject_key_event(key: KeyEvent)
tasks.description: Inject keyboard events into the PTY using crossterm KeyEvent format, simulating user keyboard input.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify KeyEvent injection produces correct character output
AddUnitTest: verify special keys (Enter, Escape, etc.) are handled correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Use crossterm event system to inject key events

tasks.title: Implement PtySimulator::inject_mouse_event(event: MouseEvent)
tasks.description: Inject mouse events into the PTY using crossterm MouseEvent format, simulating mouse interactions.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify MouseEvent injection is handled without error
AddUnitTest: verify mouse button events are processed correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Use crossterm mouse event format for injection

tasks.title: Add unit tests for PtySimulator
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests covering all PtySimulator methods including edge cases and error conditions.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute all PtySimulator tests and verify 100% pass rate
tasks.impl_notes: Test all public methods with normal and error paths

tasks.title: Define CellDiff struct with x, y, expected, actual fields
tasks.description: Create CellDiff struct in diff.rs with x (column), y (row), expected (Cell), and actual (Cell) fields to represent a single cell difference.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify CellDiff struct fields are accessible and correct type
tasks.impl_notes: Use u16 for coordinates to match ratatui Cell type

tasks.title: Define DiffResult struct with cells vector and total_diffs
tasks.description: Create DiffResult struct containing a vector of CellDiff and total_diffs count for summary information.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify DiffResult struct creation with empty cells
AddUnitTest: verify total_diffs matches cells vector length
tasks.impl_notes: Implement Display trait for DiffResult

tasks.title: Add ignore_colors field to BufferDiff
tasks.description: Add boolean ignore_colors field to BufferDiff struct to control whether foreground/background colors are compared.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ignore_colors field is configurable via constructor
AddRegressionTest: verify default behavior is to compare colors
tasks.impl_notes: Default should be false for backwards compatibility

tasks.title: Add ignore_attributes field to BufferDiff
tasks.description: Add boolean ignore_attributes field to BufferDiff struct to control whether attributes (bold, italic, underline) are compared.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ignore_attributes field is configurable via constructor
AddRegressionTest: verify default behavior is to compare attributes
tasks.impl_notes: Default should be false for backwards compatibility

tasks.title: Implement BufferDiff::new() constructor with options
tasks.description: Implement BufferDiff constructor that accepts ignore_colors and ignore_attributes options using builder pattern.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new() creates BufferDiff with default options
AddUnitTest: verify builder pattern allows setting ignore_colors and ignore_attributes
tasks.impl_notes: Use builder pattern for fluent API

tasks.title: Implement BufferDiff::compare(expected, actual)
tasks.description: Cell-by-cell comparison of two ratatui Buffers, populating CellDiff for each difference found.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify identical buffers return zero diffs
AddUnitTest: verify different cells are reported with correct x,y coordinates
AddUnitTest: verify ignore_colors option skips color comparison
AddUnitTest: verify ignore_attributes option skips attribute comparison
AddUnitTest: verify buffers with different sizes are handled
tasks.impl_notes: Iterate through buffer area and compare each cell

tasks.title: Implement BufferDiff::to_string()
tasks.description: Convert DiffResult to human-readable string format showing x,y coordinates and expected vs actual values.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify output format shows correct x,y coordinates
AddUnitTest: verify expected and actual values are shown
AddUnitTest: verify total diff count is included
tasks.impl_notes: Format: 'Diff at (x, y): expected=<value> actual=<value>'

tasks.title: Add unit tests for BufferDiff
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests covering all BufferDiff functionality.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute all BufferDiff tests and verify 100% pass rate
tasks.impl_notes: Test all public methods with normal and edge cases

tasks.title: Add serde_json dependency to Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Add serde_json dependency to opencode-rust/ratatui-testing/Cargo.toml for JSON serialization.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify Cargo.toml contains serde_json with correct version
tasks.impl_notes: Add serde_json with derive feature

tasks.title: Implement StateTester::capture(state)
tasks.description: Serialize any serializable state to a JSON snapshot for later comparison.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify capture produces valid JSON for serializable types
AddUnitTest: verify capture handles nested structures correctly
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error is returned for non-serializable types
tasks.impl_notes: Use serde_json::to_string for serialization

tasks.title: Implement StateTester::assert_state(current)
tasks.description: Compare current state to previously captured snapshot and report mismatches.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify identical state passes assertion
AddUnitTest: verify different state fails with mismatch details
AddUnitTest: verify mismatch shows expected vs actual values
tasks.impl_notes: Return Result with detailed mismatch information

tasks.title: Implement StateTester::assert_state_matches(expected)
tasks.description: Compare current state to expected JSON directly instead of a captured snapshot.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify matching state passes assertion
AddUnitTest: verify non-matching JSON fails with detailed error
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid JSON is handled gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Parse expected as JSON string first

tasks.title: Implement JSON diff reporting for mismatches
tasks.description: Provide detailed JSON diff output showing specific fields that differ between expected and actual state.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify diff shows field paths that differ
AddUnitTest: verify diff shows values at each field path
AddUnitTest: verify nested field differences are reported correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Implement custom diff format for JSON

tasks.title: Add unit tests for StateTester
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests covering all StateTester functionality.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute all StateTester tests and verify 100% pass rate
tasks.impl_notes: Test all public methods with normal and edge cases

tasks.title: Add PtySimulator, BufferDiff, StateTester as fields to TestDsl
tasks.description: Add all three components as fields in TestDsl struct for composition.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify TestDsl struct contains all three component fields
tasks.impl_notes: All fields should be private with public accessor methods

tasks.title: Implement TestDsl::new()
tasks.description: Initialize all components (PtySimulator, BufferDiff, StateTester) in TestDsl constructor.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify new() creates all component instances
AddUnitTest: verify all components are initialized correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Initialize with default configurations

tasks.title: Implement TestDsl::render_widget(widget)
tasks.description: Render a ratatui widget to a Buffer and return for comparison.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify widget renders to Buffer without error
AddUnitTest: verify returned Buffer contains expected content
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify panic recovery for rendering failures
tasks.impl_notes: Use ratatui::buffer::Buffer and widget.render()

tasks.title: Implement TestDsl::send_keys(keys)
tasks.description: Simulate keyboard input by sending keys to the PTY.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify keys are sent to PTY successfully
AddUnitTest: verify multiple keys can be sent in sequence
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for PTY not initialized
tasks.impl_notes: Delegate to PtySimulator::inject_key_event

tasks.title: Implement TestDsl::wait_for(predicate, timeout)
tasks.description: Wait for a condition predicate to become true, with specified timeout duration.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify wait_for returns true when predicate succeeds
AddUnitTest: verify wait_for returns false when timeout expires
AddUnitTest: verify timeout duration is respected
tasks.impl_notes: Use tokio time for async timeout support

tasks.title: Implement TestDsl::assert_buffer_eq(expected)
tasks.description: Compare rendered buffer with expected buffer and report differences.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify identical buffers pass assertion
AddUnitTest: verify different buffers fail with diff output
AddUnitTest: verify error message contains diff details
tasks.impl_notes: Delegate to BufferDiff for comparison

tasks.title: Verify fluent API composition works correctly
tasks.description: Verify that method chaining works correctly across all TestDsl methods.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify .send_keys().wait_for().assert_buffer_eq() chain works
AddUnitTest: verify all methods return Self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: All mutation methods must return Self

tasks.title: Add unit tests for TestDsl
tasks.description: Add comprehensive unit tests covering all TestDsl functionality including fluent API.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute all TestDsl tests and verify 100% pass rate
tasks.impl_notes: Test all public methods with normal and edge cases

tasks.title: Add assert_cmd dependency to Cargo.toml

tasks.title: Add tempfile to dev-dependencies in Cargo.toml

tasks.title: Implement CliTester::new(bin: &str)
tasks.description: Create CliTester instance with path to binary under test.

AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error when binary path does not exist
tasks.impl_notes: Validate binary exists at construction time

tasks.title: Implement builder pattern with args(args: &[&str])
tasks.description: Add builder method to set command-line arguments for the CLI process.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify args are passed to child process correctly
AddUnitTest: verify multiple arguments are handled correctly
AddUnitTest: verify builder returns Self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Store args in CliTester struct for use in run()

tasks.title: Implement builder pattern with env(key, value)
tasks.description: Add builder method to set environment variables for the CLI process.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify env is set correctly for child process
AddUnitTest: verify multiple env vars can be set
AddUnitTest: verify builder returns Self for chaining
tasks.impl_notes: Store env vars in CliTester struct for use in run()

tasks.title: Implement CliTester::temp_dir()
tasks.description: Create a temporary directory that is automatically cleaned up when dropped.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify temp_dir() creates a valid directory
AddUnitTest: verify returned path can be used by CLI process
AddUnitTest: verify directory is cleaned up on drop
tasks.impl_notes: Use tempfile::TempDir for automatic cleanup

tasks.title: Implement CliTester::run()

AddUnitTest: verify stderr is captured correctly

tasks.title: Ensure automatic cleanup of temp directories
tasks.description: Verify that temporary directories created by temp_dir() are automatically cleaned up when CliTester is dropped.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify temp directory does not exist after CliTester drop
AddUnitTest: verify cleanup happens even on test failure
tasks.impl_notes: Use Drop trait or RAII pattern for cleanup
